title: Auction of State Government Securities
description: The following State Governments have offered to sell stock by way of auction, for an aggregate amount of ₹13,450 Crore (Face Value). Sr. No. State Amount to be raised (₹ Crore) Tenor (Year) Type of Auction 1. Assam 750 Re-issue of 7.62% Assam SGS 2041, issued on March 11, 2026 Price 2. Bihar 1200 Re-issue of 7.69% Bihar SGS 2035, issued on April 29, 2026 Price 1200 15 Yield 3. Chhattisgarh 500 Re-issue of 7.68% Chhattisgarh SGS 2036, issued on April 29, 2026 Price 500 Re-issue of 7.8
